rationale: Active war continues as the dominant reality; EU accession process launched last cycle but no new step this cycle; no new major escalation or aid change.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia continues — no new major escalation
top_events.summary: The war remains the central daily reality for Ukrainians; no new qualitative escalation this cycle, but ongoing strikes and infrastructure pressure persist.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Ukraine's EU accession process formally launched last cycle remains a landmark positive signal, though no new concrete step was taken this cycle.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's public acknowledgment of economic strain from the war is a mild positive signal for Ukraine, suggesting pressure on Russia's war capacity.
